## Summary

<!-- What does this change do and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Conventional Commit type that the squash/merge commit will use. -->
- [ ] feat — new functionality (minor bump)
- [ ] fix — bug fix (patch bump)
- [ ] refactor / perf
- [ ] docs / chore / style / test / ci / build (no release)
- [ ] breaking change (note it with `!` or a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer)

## Testing

<!-- Commands run and what was verified. Manual/hardware testing if relevant. -->
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Verified in a browser / against a device (describe):

## Notes

<!-- Firmware-compat impact, follow-ups, screenshots, anything reviewers should know. -->
